RuleSet.Name: RamProjectPOM
RuleSet.GenFile:
$POMHeader$ <parent> <groupId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$MajorVersionName$_$MinorVersionName$</groupId> <artifactId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$MajorVersionName$_$MinorVersionName$</artifactId> <version>$MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> </parent>
<groupId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$MajorVersionName$_$MinorVersionName$</groupId> <artifactId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$MajorVersionName$_$MinorVersionName$.$lower SchemaName$.$SchemaName$Ram</artifactId> <version>$MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> <name>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$MajorVersionName$_$MinorVersionName$.$lower SchemaName$.$SchemaName$Ram</name> <description>$TopProjectDescription$ $SchemaName$Ram $MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$ $SubProjectDescription$ RAM persistence</description> <url>https://$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TldName$/$lower TopProjectName$/</url>
<properties> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> <maven.compiler.source>21</maven.compiler.source> <maven.compiler.target>21</maven.compiler.target> </properties>
<dependencies> <dependency> <groupId>org.msscf.msscf.v2_13</groupId> <artifactId>org.msscf.msscf.v2_13.cflib.CFLib</artifactId> <version>$MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> </dependency> <dependency> <groupId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$lower MajorVersionName$_$lower MinorVersionName$</groupId> <artifactId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$lower MajorVersionName$_$lower MinorVersionName$.$lower SchemaName$</artifactId> <version>$MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> </dependency>$iterate SchemaRefs( each DependsOnSchemaRefBasePOM empty empty )$ <dependency> <groupId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$lower MajorVersionName$_$lower MinorVersionName$</groupId> <artifactId>$lower TldName$.$lower TopDomainName$.$lower TopProjectName$.v$lower MajorVersionName$_$lower MinorVersionName$.$lower SchemaName$.$SchemaName$SaxLoader</artifactId> <version>$MajorVersionName$.$MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> </dependency> $iterate SchemaRefs( each DependsOnSchemaRefSaxLoaderPOM empty empty )$ </dependencies>
<build> <pluginManagement> </pluginManagement> </build>
<reporting> <plugins> <plugin> <artifactId>maven-project-info-reports-plugin</artifactId> </plugin> </plugins> </reporting> </project>
RuleSet.GenRule: <dependency> <groupId>$lower reference RefSchema TldName$.$lower reference RefSchema TopDomainName$.$lower reference RefSchema TopProjectName$.v$lower reference RefSchema MajorVersionName$_$lower reference RefSchema MinorVersionName$</groupId> <artifactId>$lower reference RefSchema TldName$.$lower reference RefSchema TopDomainName$.$lower reference RefSchema TopProjectName$.v$lower reference RefSchema MajorVersionName$_$lower reference RefSchema MinorVersionName$.$lower reference RefSchema SchemaName$.$reference RefSchema SchemaName$SaxLoader</artifactId> <version>$reference RefSchema MajorVersionName$.$reference RefSchema MinorVersionName$.$GeneratingBuild$</version> </dependency>
